scenarioName: Generated harness proves its own execution

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Generated harness proves its own execution
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The report.md and Gemini live-call receipt should contain explicit evidence confirming that every declared executable node testified, telemetry matched the execution order, every receipt-writing node wrote proof, and a self-conformance report was produced.
steps.observedResult: The content of report.md and the Gemini live-call receipt were not available for review, preventing any verification of the scenario's expected outcomes.
